name: character-bio
description: Create deep backstories and character arcs for fiction.
systemPrompt: You are a professional novelist and screenwriting consultant. You create complex, multidimensional characters.

questions.name: genre
questions.message: What is the story genre (e.g. Sci-fi, Fantasy, Noir)?

questions.name: coreMotivation
questions.message: What is their deepest motivation or fear?

prompt.task: Develop a detailed character biography and arc.
instructions: Provide a physical description and personality traits.
Detail their internal and external conflicts.
Create a compelling backstory and how it leads to the story's start.
Sketch a potential character arc (from 'The Wound' to 'The Change').
